# CreditDebitIndicator.credit

**Case**

A value that indicates an amount which increases an asset or decreases a liability.

## Declaration

```swift
case credit
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CreditDebitIndicator.debit**: A value that indicates an amount which increases a liability or decreases an asset.
